marketType.name: 1X2 - FT
marketType.explainer: Pick what the result will be for the stated period: 1 (home win), X (draw), 2 (away win).

marketType.name: To Qualify
marketType.explainer: Pick which team will advance to the next round (or lift the trophy, if you’re betting on a final).

marketType.name: Double Chance - FT
marketType.explainer: Pick 2 results in 1 bet: 1X (home win or draw), X2 (draw or away win) or 12 (home or away win).

marketType.name: Both Teams To Score - FT
marketType.displayName: Both Teams To Score | Full Time
marketType.explainer: Will both teams score at least 1 goal during the stated period? Pick either Yes or No.

marketType.name: {handicap} Goal
marketType.explainer: Predict which team will score the next goal in the match. Next goal number is in brackets.

marketType.name: Total Score Over/Under - FT
marketType.explainer: Pick how many goals will be scored during the stated period. Over is more than that amount, Under is less.

marketType.name: Total Score Over/Under - FT - Home Team
marketType.explainer: Pick how many goals will be scored by home team during the stated period. Over is more than that amount, Under is less.

marketType.name: Winning Method - FT inc OT
marketType.displayName: How Will the Whole Tie Be Decided? (Winning Method)
marketType.explainer: Predict which team will win and the method of the victory. This market is offered in the deciding leg of a tie only and winner will be determined based on the outcome of the entire tie.

marketType.name: Handicap 1X2 - FT
marketType.explainer: Bet on the result with a handicap applied in the stated period. 1 (Home -1) means the Home team starts with 1-goal disadvantage. In order for the bet to be successful, Home team must win the game by at least 2 goals or more. X (Home -1) means if the Home team wins by exactly 1 goal, the result will be a draw and bet wins. 2 (Away +1) means the Away team starts with 1-goal advantage. In order for this bet to be successful, Away team must win or draw.

marketType.name: 1X2 - 2H
marketType.explainer: Pick what the result will be for the stated period: 1 (home win), X (draw), 2 (away win).

marketType.name: Total Score Over/Under - 2H
marketType.explainer: Pick how many goals will be scored during the stated period. Over is more than that amount, Under is less.

marketType.name: Handicap 1X2 - 2H
marketType.explainer: Bet on the result with a handicap applied in the stated period. 1 (Home -1) means the Home team starts with 1-goal disadvantage. In order for the bet to be successful, Home team must win the game by at least 2 goals or more. X (Home -1) means if the Home team wins by exactly 1 goal, the result will be a draw and bet wins. 2 (Away +1) means the Away team starts with 1-goal advantage. In order for this bet to be successful, Away team must win or draw.

marketType.name: Asian Handicap - FT
marketType.explainer: Bet on the result with a handicap applied in the stated period. 1 (-1.5)  means the Home team starts with 1.5-goal disadvantage. In order for the bet to be successful, Home team must win the game by at least 2 goals or more. 2 (+1.5) means the Away team starts with 1.5-goal advantage. In order for the bet to be successful, Away team must either win, draw or lose the game by no more than 1 goal.

marketType.name: Asian Handicap - 2H
marketType.explainer: Bet on the result with a handicap applied in the stated period. 1 (-1.5)  means the Home team starts with 1.5-goal/point disadvantage. In order for the bet to be successful, Home team must win the game by at least 2 goals/points or more. 2 (+1.5) means the Away team starts with 1.5-goal/point advantage. In order for the bet to be successful, Away team must either win, draw or lose the game by no more than 1 goal/point.

marketType.name: 1X2 and Totals - FT
marketType.explainer: Predict the result of the match and whether the total number of goals scored during the stated time period will be over or under the specified goal line.

marketType.name: Draw No Bet - FT
marketType.explainer: Bet on either the home team (1) or away team (2). If it’s a draw, you get your stake refunded.

marketType.name: Draw No Bet - 2H
marketType.explainer: Bet on either the home team (1) or away team (2). If it’s a draw, you get your stake refunded.

marketType.name: Home No Bet - FT
marketType.explainer: Pick what the result will be for the stated period: X (draw) or 2 (away win). Home win = stake refunded.

marketType.name: Correct Score - FT
marketType.explainer: Pick what the scoreline will be for the stated period. Other covers every scoreline that isn’t listed.

marketType.name: Correct Score - 2H
marketType.explainer: Pick what the scoreline will be for the stated period. Other covers every scoreline that isn’t listed.

marketType.name: Double Chance and Both Teams To Score - FT
marketType.displayName: Double Chance and Both Teams To Score | Full Time
marketType.explainer: Predict two of three possible outcomes of the stated period and whether both teams score in the match or not.

marketType.name: Clean Sheet Away Team - FT
marketType.explainer: Pick whether the named team will successfully avoid conceding any goals during the stated period.

marketType.name: Odd / Even - FT
marketType.explainer: Pick whether the number of goals scored during the stated period will be Odd or Even. 0 is considered Even.

marketType.name: Odd / Even - 2H
marketType.explainer: Pick whether the total points scored during the stated period will be Odd or Even. 0 is considered Even.

marketType.name: Odd / Even - FT- Home Team
marketType.explainer: Pick whether the number of goals scored during the stated period will be Odd or Even. 0 is considered Even.

marketType.name: Odd / Even - FT - Away Team
marketType.explainer: Pick whether the number of goals scored during the stated period will be Odd or Even. 0 is considered Even.

marketType.name: Anytime Goalscorer
marketType.explainer: Bet on the player scoring at anytime in regular time. Extra time and own goals do not count. If a player does not play, bets on that player will be void.

marketType.name: Double Chance - 2H
marketType.explainer: Pick 2 results in 1 bet: 1X (home win or draw), X2 (draw or away win) or 12 (home or away win).

marketType.name: Both Teams To Score - 2H
marketType.displayName: Both Teams To Score | Second Half
marketType.explainer: Will both teams score at least 1 goal during the stated period? Pick either Yes or No.

marketType.name: Either half win Home - FT
marketType.explainer: Will the team score more goals than their opponent in either First Half or Second Half.

marketType.name: Both halves win Away - FT
marketType.explainer: Will the team score more goals than their opponent in both First Half and Second Half.

marketType.name: Clean Sheet Away Team - 2H
marketType.explainer: Pick whether the named team will successfully avoid conceding any goals during the stated period.

marketType.name: 1X2 and Both Teams To Score - FT
marketType.displayName: 1X2 and Both Teams To Score | Full Time
marketType.explainer: Pick the result for the stated period (1X2) and whether both teams will score in that timeframe (Yes/No).

marketType.name: 1X2 and Both Teams To Score - 2H
marketType.displayName: 1X2 and Both Teams To Score | Second half
marketType.explainer: Pick the result for the stated period (1X2) and whether both teams will score in that timeframe (Yes/No).

marketType.name: Total Corners Over/Under - FT
marketType.explainer: Predict how many corners there will be during the stated period. Over is more than that amount, Under is less. Please note that corners awarded, but not taken are not considered in settlements.

marketType.name: Total Corners - FT
marketType.explainer: Pick how many corners will be taken during the stated period from the range of options provided.

marketType.name: Corner Count Odd/Even - FT
marketType.explainer: Pick whether the number of corners taken during the stated period will be Odd or Even. 0 is considered Even.

marketType.name: Win to Nil Away Team - FT
marketType.explainer: Will a team win during the stated period without conceding any goals? Pick either Yes or No.

marketType.name: 1X2 and Totals - 2H
marketType.explainer: Predict the result of the match and whether the total number of goals scored during the stated time period will be over or under the specified goal line.

marketType.name: Double Chance and Both Teams To Score - 2H
marketType.displayName: Double Chance and Both Teams To Score | Second Half
marketType.explainer: Predict two of three possible outcomes and whether both teams will score at least one goal or not during the second half.

marketType.name: Total Goals Grouped - FT
marketType.explainer: Predict range of goals will be scored in the stated period.

marketType.name: Total Goals Grouped - 2H
marketType.explainer: Predict range of goals will be scored in the stated period.

marketType.name: Double Chance and Totals - FT
marketType.displayName: Double Chance and Over/Under | Full Time
marketType.explainer: Predict two of three possible outcomes of the match and if there will be more or fewer goals than the suggested line during the regular time.
